action.reasoning: Observation: train_v7.py crashed on printing due to old models missing 'model_class' key. New models were trained but ensemble not saved. Best eval AUC 0.7663. ~7.5 min left. Analysis: Need to fix and save ensemble, submit eval. Decision: Quick fix to save ensemble with all 11 models and submit.
